# GemmaSight v1.0.0

## 🎉 Introduction

The first official release of **GemmaSight**, the real-time AI screen description app.

## ✨ Key Features

- **Real-time Screen Analysis**: Capture and analyze any part of your screen instantly.
- **Local AI Engine**: Powered by Gemma 4 via Transformers.js & ONNX Runtime (WebGPU support).
- **Interactive UI**: Simple crop-and-analyze interface Built with Vue 3.
- **Privacy First**: All processing happens on your local machine.

## 🚀 Installation

- **Windows**: Download `gemmasight-1.0.0-setup.exe` and follow the installer.
- **macOS**: Download `gemmasight-1.0.0.dmg`, open it, and drag to Applications.

## 🛠 Prerequisites

- Supports hardware with WebGPU for optimal performance.

---

Enjoy your new AI vision!
